title: El Ibex aplaza el asalto a sus récords
summary: El Nikkei japonés se ha sumado esta mañana a los récords alcanzados ayer por Wall Street. Las esperanzas de paz en Oriente Próximo y el resurgir del PIB de China prolongan la tregua en Bolsa. El Ibex, sin embargo, contiene el optimismo y aplaza el asalto a sus récords. Leer

title: Gaza aid flotilla sets sail from Barcelona
summary: A flotilla of some 40 boats set sail for Gaza from Barcelona on Wednesday in a fresh bid to break an Israeli blockade and deliver aid to the devastated territory, organisers said.

title: Barcelona to redesign La Rambla terraces in tourism pivot
summary: The Catalan capital will redesign terraces along the famous La Rambla boulevard, emphasising space, aesthetic uniformity and quality tourism.

title: Spain’s Tenerife eyes train line to tackle car congestion
summary: The local council in Tenerife are taking steps to begin a long-awaited train project on the island, with the popular Tenerife South–Reina Sofía Airport set for a stop to help limit car congestion in the area.
